input:
Rewrite this paragraph to be clear and direct. Remove all filler:

'In today's rapidly evolving technological landscape, it is becoming increasingly apparent that organizations that wish to remain competitive in their respective industries must leverage cutting-edge artificial intelligence solutions in order to optimize their operational efficiencies and enhance their overall value proposition to their target demographic.'
criteria: under 20 words in the rewritten version
preserves the core meaning (companies need AI to stay competitive)
removes all filler phrases ('increasingly apparent', 'rapidly evolving', 'respective industries')
a reader can understand it in one pass without rereading
judge_prompt: You are evaluating a rewrite task performed by an AI writing assistant. Score 0-10. The original sentence is 53 words of pure corporate filler. Full marks: rewritten version is under 20 words, retains full meaning, zero filler, active voice. Deduct 3 points if over 25 words. Deduct 2 points for any surviving filler phrase. Deduct 2 if meaning is lost or changed.
